name_en: Temple Bell (Small Bell) of Tōfukuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, this is a small temple bell of Tōfukuji Temple. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_en: Carvings of Habu Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of the carvings of Habu Shrine. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_en: Fittings of the Main Hall of Tōfukuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the fittings and joinery of the main hall of Tōfukuji Temple. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Kaisan Hōkoku Eikoku Zō, Mokuzō Daruma Daishi Zō, Mokuzō Daigon Shuri Bosatsu Zō
name_en: Wooden Statues of the Founder Hōkoku Eikoku, Bodhidharma, and the Bodhisattva Daigon Shuri
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising wooden statues of the founding priest Hōkoku Eikoku, Bodhidharma, and the bodhisattva Daigon Shuri. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_en: Kōshin Stone Monument at Aigiri (Shōmen Kongō Statue Pillar)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a Kōshin stone monument bearing a Shōmen Kongō image, located at Aigiri. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_en: Daidai Kagura Sacred Dance of Nakayama Shrine
description_en: A folk cultural property, the Daidai Kagura sacred dance of Nakayama Shrine. It is a town-designated intangible folk cultural property of Kanna Town.

name_en: The "Marudai" Mark of Mount Nishi-Mikabo
description_en: A monument (natural monument), the "Marudai" feature of Mount Nishi-Mikabo. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Japanese Yew of Takashio-Higashizawa
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a Japanese yew tree at Takashio-Higashizawa. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Great Cedar of Yakura-Kudariyama
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a great cedar tree at Yakura-Kudariyama. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Weeping Cherry Tree of Ryūshōji Temple
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a weeping cherry tree at Ryūshōji Temple. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Dinosaur Footprints
description_en: A monument (natural monument) consisting of dinosaur footprints. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Cherry Tree of Osuwa-sama
description_en: A monument (natural monument), the cherry tree at Osuwa-sama. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Pillow Lava of the Mikabu Belt
description_en: A monument (natural monument) consisting of pillow lava of the Mikabu geological belt. It is a town-designated natural monument of Kanna Town.

name_en: Old Documents of the Annaka-juku Honjin
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising old documents of the honjin (post-station inn) of Annaka-juku. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1957-06-10, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Bridge Memorial Monument at Misumi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a bridge memorial (kuyō) monument at Misumi. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1957-09-10, located at Higashi-Kamiakima 1470-1.

name_en: Guidepost at Ehōzawa
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone guidepost at Ehōzawa. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1957-09-11, located at Nishi-Kamiakima 1816-2.

name_en: Sacred Kannon Stone Monument
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone monument of the Sacred Kannon (Shō Kannon). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1958-03-14, located at Saginomiya 121-2.

name_en: Documents Held by Kitanoji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising documents held by Kitanoji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1958-07-15, located at Shimo-Gokan 1249.

name_en: Shrine Building of Kumano Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the shrine building of Kumano Shrine. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1962-03-27, located at Annaka 3-chōme 689.

name_en: Documents Held by the Hagiwara Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising documents held by the Hagiwara family. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1966-04-18, located at Higashi-Kamiisobe 852.

name_romaji: Ten Sō Chōyō, Koga Kinzan no Hi
name_en: Monument of Ten Sō Chōyō and Koga Kinzan
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone monument associated with Ten Sō Chōyō and Koga Kinzan. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1970-12-18, located at Matsuida-machi Nibori 1335-1.

name_en: Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra in Six Hundred Volumes
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra (Daihannyakyō) in six hundred volumes. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1970-12-18, located at Matsuida-machi Gyōda 951.

name_en: Old Documents of the Sone Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising old documents of the Sone family. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1971-05-27, located at Matsuida-machi Tōge 20.

name_en: Bashō Haiku Monument
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone monument inscribed with a haiku by Bashō. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1972-11-28, located at Matsuida-machi Sakamoto.

name_en: Seisai Unmushū and Sansen Unmushū Anthologies
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the Seisai Unmushū and Sansen Unmushū anthologies. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1973-12-25, located at Kaminita 951.

name_romaji: Annaka Jōshu Naitō Yamashiro-no-kami Masamori Shinpitsu "Shinki" Jōge Nikan
name_en: "Shinki" in Two Volumes, Autograph of Naitō Masamori, Lord of Annaka Castle
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the two-volume work "Shinki" in the autograph hand of Naitō Yamashiro-no-kami Masamori, lord of Annaka Castle. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1973-12-25, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Bell of Shōmyōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the temple bell of Shōmyōji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1973-12-25, located at Itahana 2212.

name_en: Bell of Keishōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the temple bell of Keishōji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1973-12-25, located at Shimo-Akima 112.

name_romaji: Kan'u-tei Sōsho no Genpan Oyobi Sonota no Genpan
name_en: Original Printing Blocks of the Kan'u-tei Series and Others
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the original printing blocks of the Kan'u-tei book series and other original blocks. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1974-10-30, located at Matsuida-machi Hara 60-1.

name_en: Drum of Annaka-sama
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the drum known as Annaka-sama no Otaiko. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1975-12-15, located at Kaminita 951.

name_romaji: Yamaoka Tesshū Kigō no Gaku (Tsuketari "Kōritsu Annakakō" Kōmeiban)
name_en: Framed Calligraphy by Yamaoka Tesshū (with the "Kōritsu Annakakō" School Name Board)
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising a framed tablet of calligraphy by Yamaoka Tesshū, together with the "Kōritsu Annakakō" school name board added later. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1975-12-15, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Twenty-two Administrative Diaries of Annaka Elementary School
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising twenty-two volumes of administrative diaries of Annaka Elementary School. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1975-12-15, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Bell of Shinkōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the temple bell of Shinkōji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1977-12-22, located at Haraichi 3-chōme 2-42.

name_en: Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a statue of the bodhisattva Jizō. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1980-06-25, located at the Jizō Hall (a detached hall of Manpukuji Temple) at Haraichi 2286-1.

name_en: Monument of Isogai Unpō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone monument associated with Isogai Unpō. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1982-03-24, located at Matsuida-machi Shimo-Masuda 203-1.

name_en: Myōgi Road Everlasting Lantern at Gōbara
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone everlasting lantern of the Myōgi road at Gōbara. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1985-06-21, located at Gōbara 1476-1.

name_en: Hōkyōintō Stone Pagoda of Jishōji Temple at Gōbara
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a hōkyōintō stone pagoda at Jishōji Temple in Gōbara. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1985-11-21, located at Gōbara 2803.

name_en: Main Gate of Kensōji Temple (with Hanging Tablet)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the sanmon main gate of Kensōji Temple, together with its hanging tablet. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1987-02-27, located at Matsuida-machi Hijio 2331.

name_en: Festival Float of Kamimachi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the festival float (dashi) of Kamimachi. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1990-01-31, located at Matsuida-machi Matsuida 548.

name_en: English-language Award Certificate of the Usui Company from a World Exposition
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an English-language award certificate presented to the Usui Company at a world exposition. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1990-09-26, located at Kaminita 951.
